# Name: # NVS holds the Thread dataset + any NVS-stored runtime state. Kept at the
# same offset/size as the pre-OTA layout so we preserve Thread credentials
# across the partition-table migration — flash with `idf.py erase-region`
# OTA data partition: bootloader reads this to decide which of ota_0/ota_1
# Two OTA app slots. Either can be the running partition; the other is the
# update target. Sized at ~1.875 MB each; current firmware is comfortably
# under 1.2 MB so there's headroom for the OTA client code (E2).
